article_title: C# 表达式树替代反射：何时该做性能升级
core_theme: 用表达式树替代反射，将动态成员访问的运行时开销压缩到近乎零
reader_takeaway: 管线，可以为属性读取、设置、构造工厂、方法调用各场景生成可直接使用的代码
summary_angle: 一次性编译成本换来无限次零反射热路径

information_blocks.source_anchor: PropertyInfo.GetValue() 每次调用都需要：验证存在性、虚调用链分派、值类型装箱、返回 object
information_blocks.visual_idea: 左侧展示反射调用链中的多个重复步骤（每次调用都重走一遍）

information_blocks.source_anchor: 四步管线：Get MemberInfo → Build expression tree → .Compile() → Cache delegate
information_blocks.visual_idea: 右侧展示管线：1 次 reflect → 1 次 .Compile() → ∞ 次原生速度调用

information_blocks.source_anchor: Every single call repeats that work. Expression trees front-load all of it into the one-time .Compile() step.
information_blocks.visual_idea: 中间一条分界线或箭头，左侧密集的多步重复，右侧简洁的单路径

information_blocks.source_anchor: The sweet spot: high-frequency calls (serialization, mapping, property binding) where the set of types is fixed after startup but not known at compile time.
information_blocks.visual_idea: 底部轻量标签区：序列化 / 映射 / 属性绑定

main_metaphor: 熔炉与模具：反射是每次手工锻造，表达式树是一次铸模、无限次浇注
primary_subject: 一名开发者将一段代码从
subject_action: 正在将一堆散乱的反射调用链汇聚成单一的编译管线，并封装进缓存
selected_style_prompt_descriptor: game concept art illustration, clear hero object, readable environment storytelling, polished lighting, production-art detail
selected_style_reason: 随机选中；游戏原画风的清晰主体感与生产级细节适合展现
的主题，不会让画面流于泛科技氛围
style_safety_note: 游戏原画风不涉及具体品牌、工作室或在世艺术家，无需安全改写
draft_goal: 验证左右对照构图、before-after 叙事弧线、主体明确（编译管线 vs 反射调用链）
revision_targets: 如果画面出现假代码或假终端，立刻重生
如果主对照弧线不清晰，收紧 before 一侧的视觉密度
确保可见文字不超过 3 处且均来自 information_blocks
final_prompt:
Wide cover illustration, aspect ratio 2.35:1. Game concept art illustration, clear hero object, readable environment storytelling, polished lighting, production-art detail. Editorial technical illustration.

Left side (BEFORE): A dense tangle of repeated call steps glowing faintly — same loop executed over and over, each iteration triggers validate, dispatch, box, return object. A short Chinese label chip reads '每次调用'. The visual is slightly chaotic: many overlapping arrows in a loop.

Center: A clean vertical dividing line with a single bold directional arrow pointing right, labeled '零开销'.

Right side (AFTER): A streamlined single pipeline: one input → one Compile step → an infinite-repeat arrow labeled '编译后缓存' flowing cleanly forward. The palette is cooler, cleaner, more confident. The call path is a straight line, not a loop.

Bottom: subtle label row — three small chips: 序列化 / 映射 / 属性绑定. No long sentences.

Color palette: deep navy #1a2a4a background, electric blue #3c7abf for pipeline elements, amber #f5c842 for the compile step, white for labels. The left side is slightly warmer and murkier; the right side is crisp and illuminated.

No watermarks, no fake dashboard, no fake terminal, no fake chart axes, no hero title text, no English slogans. Visible text: only the three Chinese chips '每次调用', '编译后缓存', '零开销', each under 6 characters. Wide cinematic composition.
